subcodes.first_line: O My Name! Tribulation and adversity have indeed befallen thee, and I am more aware than thou art of thyself and of that which hath come upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا اسمی قد مستک الباساء و الضرآء و انا اعلم منک بک و بما ورد علیک و لیس
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @free will and predestination; fate, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayer for unity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @thankfulness; gratitude
